prompt: A photorealistic interior view of a bustling Japanese bookstore. The scene is illuminated by warm overhead lighting that reflects off the polished wooden floor. In the foreground, large wooden display tables are stacked high with books, many featuring anime-style illustrated covers facing outward. Above the shelves, prominent hanging signs display Japanese text, including a red sign on the left reading 新刊コーナー and a blue sign on the right reading 旅行ガイド. A central hanging directional sign points towards different sections. Tall wooden bookshelves packed tightly with colorful spines line the walls, creating deep aisles. In the mid-ground, a woman in a green top browsing stands looking at the shelves. The atmosphere is cozy, inviting, and highly detailed.
